blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
